spec_match.rationale: Demonstrates combining multiple elements onto a 2D canvas using `ctx.drawElement()` under various opacity and transform settings, fully aligning with the API's capabilities.

interactive.rationale: Provides active controls for opacity and rotation of individual layers that update the composition interactively on click.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The concept description perfectly matches the provided multi-layer transformation and opacity compositing features.

edge_cases.rationale: Handles simple layers and cleared state but does not demonstrate empty element rendering, negative scaling, or complex overlapping blend modes.

references.rationale: The see-also section now includes a direct ChromeStatus link for feature 5172548013916160.

design_system.rationale: Follows the design system accurately by leveraging shared CSS variables and correct color contrasts.

openQuestions.title: Expose layer blend modes
openQuestions.detail: The blurb mentions composing multiple subtrees with different blend modes, but the UI only allows adjusting opacity and rotation. Consider adding a select input to set ctx.globalCompositeOperation for the selected layer to truly demo blend mode capabilities.

summary: An engaging interactive compositor demonstrating layered drawing with the mandatory ChromeStatus link now present. It still misses the opportunity to expose blend modes mentioned in the page description.
